steps.title: Find the lowest walnut price
steps.content: The student needs the season when walnuts reached their lowest grower price. On the graph, that means finding the shortest walnut bar, not comparing all nut types or overall totals.

steps.title: Compare the season choices
steps.content: Choices A, C, and D each name seasons with walnut bars higher than the lowest walnut bar. The remaining choice names the season with the lowest walnut price. The answer is B.
